name: foundryvtt-window-controls
description: Organize and pin floating windows for Foundry VTT

scripts.copy: mkdir -p dist && cp ./windowcontrols.js dist/ && cp ./windowcontrols.css dist/ && cp ./README.md dist/ && cp ./CHANGELOG.md dist/ && cp ./LICENSE.md dist/ && cp ./module.json dist/ && cp ./THANKS.txt dist/ && cp -r ./lang dist/ && cp -r ./scripts dist/ && cp -r ./templates dist/ && rm -f dist/scripts/deploy-dev.mjs
scripts.copyWin: mkdir dist 2>nul & copy /Y module.json dist\ & copy /Y windowcontrols.js dist\ & copy /Y windowcontrols.css dist\ & copy /Y README.md dist\ & copy /Y CHANGELOG.md dist\ & copy /Y LICENSE.md dist\ & copy /Y THANKS.txt dist\ & xcopy /Y /I /E /Q lang dist\lang\ & xcopy /Y /I /E /Q scripts dist\scripts\ & xcopy /Y /I /E /Q templates dist\templates\ & del /Q dist\scripts\deploy-dev.mjs 2>nul
scripts.build: npm run copy && npm run zip
scripts.buildWin: npm run copyWin && npm run zip

author: JeansenVaars (Saif Ellafi)
